---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
getwd()
```

# Gain timing (Gao)
- read in a gain timing index table 
- for each CNV segment/gene, compare mutation multiplicity vs major copy number
- output timing score (index) per gene per cancer type 
  - constructed as how often the SCNA happened before mutations 
  - If across loci in that region, SCNA is inferred to precede the mutations a lot of time, the region get a high timing index = early event
  - if it rarely precedes mutations, it is later 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# 1) point to your folder
gao_dir <- "/Users/annabelshinichen/Desktop/SchoolWork/MSBMI/Davoli_lab/timing_cancer_events/EachGene"

# 2) list RData files
rdata_files <- list.files(gao_dir, pattern = "\\.Rdata$", full.names = TRUE)
length(rdata_files)
head(rdata_files, 10)
```
```{r}
# 3) load ONE file (first one for now)
f <- rdata_files[1]
f

# IMPORTANT: load into a clean environment so we can see what it contains
e <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
load(f, envir = e)

# what objects are inside?
ls(e)

# show structures of the first few objects
mat <- e$time_index_matrix

dim(mat)
head(rownames(mat), 10)   # gene IDs
head(colnames(mat), 10)
```

- So each gene has 78 timing values (one per tumor sample).
- There are multiple samples, combine all sample's scores for 1 specific gene in 1 tumor type

Load timing file 
	•	rows = ENSG genes
	•	columns = TCGA samples
	•	values = timing index (high = early, low = late)
	
Compute a single score per gene per tumor type 
- use mean or median 
- collapse to 1 timing score per gene per cancer type 
```{r}
mat <- e$time_index_matrix

gene_score_mean <- rowMeans(mat, na.rm = TRUE)
gene_score_median <- apply(mat, 1, median, na.rm = TRUE)

summary(gene_score_mean) # use mean contains continous variation 
summary(gene_score_median)
```
	•	Gene_ENSG = ENSG IDs
	•	TimingIndex = Gao timing (high = early)
```{r}
# turn gene timing into a tidy data frame
gene_timing_df <- tibble(
  Gene_ENSG = names(gene_score_mean),
  TimingIndex = as.numeric(gene_score_mean)
)

summary(gene_timing_df$TimingIndex)
```

## now load full data
```{r}
# ---- Paths ----
gao_dir <- "/Users/annabelshinichen/Desktop/SchoolWork/MSBMI/Davoli_lab/timing_cancer_events/EachGene"
summary_dir <- "/Users/annabelshinichen/Desktop/SchoolWork/MSBMI/Davoli_lab"

# ---- Load TCGA summary tables (your gene→cytoband mapping lives here) ----
setwd(summary_dir)
data_table <- readRDS("SummaryTables/TCGA_summary_tables.RDS")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# need to map ENSG ID to summary table 
# mapping package (fast, offline)
if (!requireNamespace("org.Hs.eg.db", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
if (!requireNamespace("org.Hs.eg.db", quietly = TRUE)) BiocManager::install("org.Hs.eg.db")
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(dplyr) 
```


Build a SYMBOL → ENSG mapping (for ALL genes in your summary tables)
```{r}
all_symbols <- sort(unique(unlist(lapply(data_table, function(df) df$Gene))))

raw_map <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  x       = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys    = all_symbols,
  keytype = "SYMBOL",
  columns = c("SYMBOL", "ENSEMBL")
)

symbol_to_ensg <- unique(raw_map[, c("SYMBOL","ENSEMBL")])
symbol_to_ensg <- symbol_to_ensg[!is.na(symbol_to_ensg$ENSEMBL), ]
names(symbol_to_ensg) <- c("Gene", "ENSG")
```

```{r}
# apply to all tumors
merged_by_tumor  <- list()
cytoband_timing  <- list()
arm_timing       <- list()

common_tumors <- intersect(names(data_table), names(gao_gene_timing))

for (tumor in common_tumors) {

  # rename Gao ENSG column to be explicit
  gao_t <- gao_gene_timing[[tumor]]
  names(gao_t)[names(gao_t) == "Gene"] <- "ENSG"

  # 1) add ENSG to summary table via SYMBOL mapping
  tmp <- merge(data_table[[tumor]], symbol_to_ensg, by = "Gene", all.x = TRUE)

  # 2) add TimingScore via ENSG
  tmp <- merge(tmp, gao_t, by = "ENSG", all.x = TRUE)

  # 3) Arm from Cytoband
  tmp$Arm <- sub("([0-9XY]+[pq]).*", "\\1", tmp$Cytoband)

  merged_by_tumor[[tumor]] <- tmp

  # Cytoband aggregate
  cytoband_timing[[tumor]] <- aggregate(
    TimingScore ~ Cytoband,
    data = tmp,
    FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  # Arm aggregate
  arm_timing[[tumor]] <- aggregate(
    TimingScore ~ Arm,
    data = tmp,
    FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# sanity check on LUAD after the full pipeline
head(merged_by_tumor$LUAD[, c("Gene","ENSG","Cytoband","TimingScore")], 10)
c(
  luad_has_ensg   = sum(!is.na(merged_by_tumor$LUAD$ENSG)),
  luad_has_timing = sum(!is.na(merged_by_tumor$LUAD$TimingScore))
)
```

```{r}
raw_map <- raw_map[!is.na(raw_map$ENSEMBL), ]
raw_map <- raw_map[!duplicated(raw_map$SYMBOL), ]   # keep first ENSG per symbol
symbol_to_ensg <- data.frame(Gene = raw_map$SYMBOL, ENSG = raw_map$ENSEMBL)

# check again 
nrow(data_table$LUAD)
nrow(merged_by_tumor$LUAD)
```

```{r}
# Build SYMBOL -> ENSG map (1 row per SYMBOL)
all_symbols <- sort(unique(unlist(lapply(data_table, function(df) df$Gene))))

raw_map <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  x       = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys    = all_symbols,
  keytype = "SYMBOL",
  columns = c("SYMBOL", "ENSEMBL")
)

raw_map <- raw_map[!is.na(raw_map$ENSEMBL), c("SYMBOL","ENSEMBL")]
raw_map <- raw_map[!duplicated(raw_map$SYMBOL), ]   # keep ONE ENSG per symbol

symbol_to_ensg <- data.frame(
  Gene = raw_map$SYMBOL,
  ENSG = raw_map$ENSEMBL,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# merge by tumor 
merged_by_tumor  <- list()
cytoband_timing  <- list()
arm_timing       <- list()

common_tumors <- intersect(names(data_table), names(gao_gene_timing))

for (tumor in common_tumors) {

  gao_t <- gao_gene_timing[[tumor]]
  names(gao_t)[names(gao_t) == "Gene"] <- "ENSG"  # ENSG IDs

  # 1) add ENSG to summary table (NO row inflation now)
  tmp <- merge(data_table[[tumor]], symbol_to_ensg, by = "Gene", all.x = TRUE)

  # 2) add TimingScore via ENSG
  tmp <- merge(tmp, gao_t, by = "ENSG", all.x = TRUE)

  # 3) Arm from Cytoband
  tmp$Arm <- sub("([0-9XY]+[pq]).*", "\\1", tmp$Cytoband)

  merged_by_tumor[[tumor]] <- tmp

  # Cytoband timing
  cytoband_timing[[tumor]] <- aggregate(
    TimingScore ~ Cytoband,
    data = tmp,
    FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  # Arm timing
  arm_timing[[tumor]] <- aggregate(
    TimingScore ~ Arm,
    data = tmp,
    FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}
```

```{r}
# row count must match
c(
  luad_summary_rows = nrow(data_table$LUAD),
  luad_merged_rows  = nrow(merged_by_tumor$LUAD)
)

# how many genes got mapped + got timing?
c(
  luad_has_ensg   = sum(!is.na(merged_by_tumor$LUAD$ENSG)),
  luad_has_timing = sum(!is.na(merged_by_tumor$LUAD$TimingScore))
)

head(merged_by_tumor$LUAD[, c("Gene","ENSG","Cytoband","Arm","TimingScore")], 10)
head(arm_timing$LUAD)
head(cytoband_timing$LUAD)
```

```{r}
# make a long timing table
arm_reg_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(arm_reg, function(df, tt) {
  df <- tibble::as_tibble(df)

  df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Event == "Gain") %>%     # GAINS ONLY
    dplyr::mutate(TCGA_TumorType = tt) %>%
    dplyr::select(TCGA_TumorType, Arm, Z_val, P_val)
})

```

th
```{r}
# Load immune regression output (arm-level CNV vs immune) and make long df
arm_reg <- readRDS("Regression_Outputs_is0.3_ArmCNV_continuous0.2.rds")

arm_reg_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(arm_reg, function(sub, tt) {
  sub <- as.data.frame(sub)

  need <- c("Arm", "Event", "Z_val", "P_val")
  if (!all(need %in% colnames(sub))) return(tibble::tibble())

  sub %>%
    dplyr::select(Arm, Event, Z_val, P_val) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(TCGA_TumorType = tt)
})

stopifnot(nrow(arm_reg_df) > 0)
```



```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Join: (Tumor, Arm) -> add Gao arm timing
# -----------------------------
merged_gain <- arm_reg_df %>%
  left_join(gao_arm_df, by = c("TCGA_TumorType","Arm")) %>%
  filter(Event == "Gain") %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val)
  )

cat("\n--- Joined GAIN rows ---\n")
print(c(
  n_rows = nrow(merged_gain),
  n_with_gao = sum(!is.na(merged_gain$GaoArmTiming))
))

```

```{r}
# ---- Load Gao timing: build a list of (Gene, TimingScore) for every tumor ----
gao_files <- list.files(gao_dir, pattern = "\\.Rdata$", full.names = TRUE)

gao_gene_timing <- list()

for (file_path in gao_files) {
  tumor <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file_path))  # e.g. "LUAD"

  e <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
  load(file_path, envir = e)

  if (!exists("time_index_matrix", envir = e)) next
  mat <- e$time_index_matrix

  # collapse sample-level timing to 1 score per gene (mean across samples)
  timing_vec <- rowMeans(mat, na.rm = TRUE)

  gao_gene_timing[[tumor]] <- tibble(
    Gene = names(timing_vec),          # ENSG IDs
    TimingScore = as.numeric(timing_vec) # high = early, low = late
  )
}

# quick sanity check
names(gao_gene_timing)
head(gao_gene_timing$LUAD)
```
```{r}
# raw matrix distribution (ignoring NA/NaN)
x <- as.numeric(mat)
x <- x[!is.na(x)]
table(x) / length(x)

# gene-level distribution
gene_score_mean <- rowMeans(mat, na.rm = TRUE)
summary(gene_score_mean)
```

```{r}
# some gene (symbols) map to multiple Ensembl IDs (due to alternative transcripts/retired IDs, etc.) so we need to keep only one ENSG per symbol
symbol_to_ensg <- raw_map %>%
  filter(!is.na(ENSEMBL)) %>%
  distinct(SYMBOL, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%   # keep first mapping per symbol
  transmute(Gene = SYMBOL, ENSG = ENSEMBL)
```


## Join with arm and cytoband data
	1.	Convert gene-level timing → arm-level timing
	2.	Use Gene ↔ Cytoband ↔ Arm from your summary table
	3.	Do this per tumor type
	4.	Gains only
	
```{r}

```



```{r}
# ---- Load Gain Timing Data ----
# Pivot gain data
pre_wgd_gain <- read.csv("chr_gains_timing_PeterVanLoo/Pre-WGD gain proportions.csv", check.names = FALSE)
post_wgd_gain <- read.csv("chr_gains_timing_PeterVanLoo/Post-WGD gain proportions.csv", check.names = FALSE)
colnames(pre_wgd_gain)[1] <- colnames(post_wgd_gain)[1] <- "TumorType"

pre_gain_long <- pre_wgd_gain %>% pivot_longer(cols = -TumorType, names_to = "Arm", values_to = "PreWGD")
post_gain_long <- post_wgd_gain %>% pivot_longer(cols = -TumorType, names_to = "Arm", values_to = "PostWGD")

# Merge safely by both columns
gain_timing <- merge(post_gain_long, pre_gain_long, by = c("TumorType", "Arm"))
gain_timing$Delta <- gain_timing$PostWGD - gain_timing$PreWGD
gain_timing$Event <- "Gain"

# ---- Load Loss Timing Data ----
pre_wgd_loss <- read.csv("chr_loss_timing_PeterVanLoo/Pre-WGD loss proportions.csv", check.names = FALSE)
post_wgd_loss <- read.csv("chr_loss_timing_PeterVanLoo/Post-WGD loss proportions.csv", check.names = FALSE)
colnames(pre_wgd_loss)[1] <- colnames(post_wgd_loss)[1] <- "TumorType"

pre_loss_long <- pre_wgd_loss %>% pivot_longer(cols = -TumorType, names_to = "Arm", values_to = "PreWGD")
post_loss_long <- post_wgd_loss %>% pivot_longer(cols = -TumorType, names_to = "Arm", values_to = "PostWGD")

loss_timing <- merge(post_loss_long, pre_loss_long, by = c("TumorType", "Arm"))
loss_timing$Delta <- loss_timing$PostWGD - loss_timing$PreWGD
loss_timing$Event <- "Loss"

# ---- Combine Gain and Loss Timing Data ----
timing_df <- bind_rows(gain_timing, loss_timing)

# Merge with TCGA 4-letter code map
tumortypes_convert <- read.csv("chr_loss_timing_PeterVanLoo/tumortypes.csv", na.strings = "")
tumortypes_convert <- tumortypes_convert[, c("TumorType", "TCGA_TumorType")]  # Keep only relevant columns

# Add TCGA_TumorType to timing data
timing_df <- merge(timing_df, tumortypes_convert, by = "TumorType")

# Filter to only mapped tumor types (drop rare/non-TCGA)
timing_df <- timing_df[!is.na(timing_df$TCGA_TumorType), ]

# Create a unique RowID for merging with regression data
timing_df$RowID <- paste0(timing_df$TCGA_TumorType, "_", timing_df$Arm, "_", timing_df$Event)
rownames(timing_df) <- timing_df$RowID
```


```{r}
### read in regression outputs
arm_reg <- readRDS("Regression_Outputs_is0.3_ArmCNV_continuous0.2.rds")
relevant_tumors <- unique(timing_df$TCGA_TumorType)
arm_reg_filt <- arm_reg[names(arm_reg) %in% relevant_tumors]

names(arm_reg_filt)
```

```{r}
# Combine regression results into 1 long-form dataframe
arm_reg_df <- data.frame()

for (tt in names(arm_reg_filt)) {
  sub <- arm_reg_filt[[tt]]

  # Make sure necessary columns exist (Z_val and P_val)
  if (!all(c("Arm", "Event", "Z_val", "P_val") %in% colnames(sub))) {
    next  # Skip if missing
  }

  sub <- sub[, c("Arm", "Event", "Z_val", "P_val")]
  sub$TCGA_TumorType <- tt
  arm_reg_df <- bind_rows(arm_reg_df, sub)
}


# Create matching RowID for merging with timing_df 
arm_reg_df$RowID <- paste0(arm_reg_df$TCGA_TumorType, "_", arm_reg_df$Arm, "_", arm_reg_df$Event)
rownames(arm_reg_df) <- arm_reg_df$RowID

# Merge with timing data  
merged_df <- merge(timing_df, arm_reg_df, by = "RowID")

# Compute weighted scores  
# Flip Y-axis sign for Loss only
merged_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = ifelse(Event.x == "Loss",
                         -1 * sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val),
                         sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val)),
    Z_logp = Z_val * -log10(P_val)
  )

# Inspect 
head(merged_df)
```

```{r}
# === BRCA & BLCA Gain ===
gain_df <- merged_df %>%
  filter(
    TCGA_TumorType.x %in% c("BRCA", "BLCA"),
    Event.x == "Gain",
    !is.na(signed_logp),
    !is.na(Delta)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    label = Arm.x,
    ChrArm = factor(ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q"))
  )

p_gain <- ggplot(gain_df, aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = ChrArm), color = "black", size = 2, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p" = 16, "q" = 17)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), color = "black", size = 2.5, vjust = -0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", label.y.npc = 0.95, size = 3, na.rm = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~Plottitle, nrow = 1) +
  xlim(0, 0.1) +  # ✅ Axis fix for BRCA Gain
  xlab("WGD Timing") +
  ylab("Signed –log10(P)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("BRCA_BLCA_GAIN_SHAPES_FIXED_xlim.pdf", p_gain, width = 10, height = 4)

# === BRCA & BLCA Loss ===
loss_df <- merged_df %>%
  filter(
    TCGA_TumorType.x %in% c("BRCA", "BLCA"),
    Event.x == "Loss",
    !is.na(signed_logp),
    !is.na(Delta)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    label = Arm.x,
    ChrArm = factor(ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q"))
  )

p_loss <- ggplot(loss_df, aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = ChrArm), color = "black", size = 2, alpha = 0.9) +  # ✅ FIXED
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p" = 16, "q" = 17)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), color = "black", size = 2.5, vjust = -0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", label.y.npc = 0.95, size = 3, na.rm = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~Plottitle, nrow = 1) +
  xlab("WGD Timing") +
  ylab("Signed –log10(P)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("BRCA_BLCA_LOSS_SHAPES_FIXED.pdf", p_loss, width = 10, height = 4)
```



***


```{r}
# Plot all CNVs 
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

cor_df <- merged_df %>%
  group_by(TCGA_TumorType.x, Event.x) %>%
  summarize(
    cor_signed_logp = cor(Delta, signed_logp, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    cor_Z_logp = cor(Delta, Z_logp, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    .groups = "drop"
)

# Plot for signed –log10(p)
cor_df$Event <- cor_df$Event.x

ggplot(cor_df, aes(x = reorder(TCGA_TumorType.x, cor_signed_logp), y = cor_signed_logp, fill = Event)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Gain" = "#EA6A6A", "Loss" = "#4F6DB8")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "SCNA Timing vs Immune Association",
    x = "Tumor Type",
    y = "Spearman Correlation (Timing vs Signed –log10(p))"
  )


```

```{r}
# 1. Store plot in a variable
p <- ggplot(cor_df, aes(x = reorder(TCGA_TumorType.x, cor_signed_logp), y = cor_signed_logp, fill = Event)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Gain" = "#EA6A6A", "Loss" = "#4F6DB8")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "SCNA Timing vs Immune Association",
    x = "Tumor Type",
    y = "Spearman Correlation (Timing vs Signed –log10(p))"
  )

# 2. Display the plot (optional)
# print(p)

# 3. Save to PDF
ggsave("SCNA_Timing_vs_Immune_Association.pdf", plot = p, width = 10, height = 8)
```

## immune cells
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Load immune heatmap matrices
immune_files <- list.files(
  path = "/Users/annabelshinichen/Desktop/SchoolWork/MSBMI/Davoli_lab/TCGA/Top_xCell_Continuous_Cytoband_Hits",
  pattern = "_COLD_heatmap_matrix.csv$", full.names = TRUE
)

# Filter for desired cell types
immune_files <- immune_files[grepl("CD8|CD4|B_cells|Macrophage_M1|Macrophage_M2|Endothelium|Fibroblasts", immune_files)]

# Load data
immune_dfs <- lapply(immune_files, fread)
names(immune_dfs) <- gsub("_COLD_heatmap_matrix.csv", "", basename(immune_files))

# === Step 2: Aggregate CNV timing data to tumor × event ===
agg_df <- merged_df %>%
  group_by(TumorType = TCGA_TumorType.x, Event = Event.x) %>%
  summarize(Delta = mean(Delta, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# === Step 3: Correlate with immune score ===
cor_list <- list()

for (celltype in names(immune_dfs)) {
  df <- immune_dfs[[celltype]]
  colnames(df)[1] <- "TumorType"
  
  # Extract numeric columns
  numeric_cols <- df[, -1, with = FALSE]
  
  # Skip if no numeric columns
  if (ncol(numeric_cols) == 0) next
  
  # Skip if all values are NA
  if (all(is.na(unlist(numeric_cols)))) next
  
  # Calculate immune score
  df$ImmuneScore <- rowMeans(numeric_cols, na.rm = TRUE)

  # Merge with CNV timing
  merged <- merge(df[, c("TumorType", "ImmuneScore")], agg_df, by = "TumorType")
  
  # Skip if nothing to correlate
  if (nrow(merged) == 0) next
  
  # Safe correlation per event
  cor_df <- merged %>%
    group_by(Event) %>%
    group_modify(~ {
      if (nrow(.x) < 3 || length(unique(.x$Delta)) < 2 || length(unique(.x$ImmuneScore)) < 2) {
        tibble(Correlation = NA_real_)
      } else {
        tibble(Correlation = cor(.x$Delta, .x$ImmuneScore, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"))
      }
    }) %>%
    mutate(CellType = celltype)
  
  cor_list[[celltype]] <- cor_df
}
# Combine all correlation results
cor_all <- bind_rows(cor_list)

# Add Event label from previous `merged` data (Event.x → Event)
cor_all$Event <- factor(cor_all$Event.x, levels = c("Gain", "Loss"))

# Optional: Remove rows with NA correlations (if you don't want to plot those)
cor_all <- cor_all %>% filter(!is.na(Correlation))

# View final correlation results
print(cor_all)
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Ensure your timing_df is ready
# Should include columns: TumorType, Arm, Delta, Event, etc.

# Initialize an empty list to store correlation results
cor_results <- list()

# Loop through each immune cell type
for (celltype in names(immune_dfs)) {
  df <- immune_dfs[[celltype]]
  
  # If TumorType not in columns, infer from rownames
  if (!"TumorType" %in% colnames(df)) {
    df$TumorType <- rownames(df)
  }
  
  # Only select numeric columns (exclude TumorType explicitly if needed)
  numeric_cols <- df[, sapply(df, is.numeric), drop = FALSE]
  
  # If no numeric columns, skip this cell type
  if (ncol(numeric_cols) == 0) next
  
  # Add ImmuneScore
  df$ImmuneScore <- rowMeans(numeric_cols, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Merge with timing data
  merged <- merge(df, timing_df, by = "TumorType")
  
  # Calculate correlation
  cor_df <- merged %>%
    group_by(TumorType, Event) %>%
    summarize(Correlation = cor(Delta, ImmuneScore, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")) %>%
    mutate(CellType = celltype)
  
  cor_results[[celltype]] <- cor_df
}
```



```{r}
# Filter to only immune-depleting CNVs (Z < 0)
merged_df_filtered <- merged_df %>% filter(Z_val < 0)

# Calculate Spearman correlations for each tumor type and event
cor_df <- merged_df_filtered %>%
  group_by(TCGA_TumorType.x, Event.x) %>%
  summarize(
    cor_signed_logp = cor(Delta, signed_logp, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Rename for plotting
cor_df$Event <- cor_df$Event.x

# Plot
ggplot(cor_df, aes(x = reorder(TCGA_TumorType.x, cor_signed_logp), y = cor_signed_logp, fill = Event)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Gain" = "#EA6A6A", "Loss" = "#4F6DB8")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "CNV Timing vs Immune Association (Immune-depleting CNVs only)",
    x = "Tumor Type",
    y = "Spearman Correlation (Timing vs Signed –log10(p))"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(filter(merged_df, TCGA_TumorType.x == "BRCA"), 
       aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp, color = Event.x)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Gain" = "#EA6A6A", "Loss" = "#4F6DB8")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Timing vs Immune Score (BRCA)",
    x = "CNV Timing (Post - Pre WGD)",
    y = "Signed –log10(p-value)"
  )
```



```{r}
ggplot(merged_df, aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp, color = Event.x)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~TCGA_TumorType.x, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Gain" = "#EA6A6A", "Loss" = "#4F6DB8")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    title = "Timing vs Immune Association Across Tumors",
    x = "Timing Δ (Post - Pre WGD)",
    y = "Signed –log10(p)"
  )
```




```{r}
library(ggpubr)

# Prepare plot labels and metadata
merged_df$Plottitle <- paste0(merged_df$TumorType, " (", merged_df$TCGA_TumorType.x, ")")
merged_df$Plottitle <- factor(merged_df$Plottitle, levels = unique(merged_df$Plottitle))
merged_df$Chromosome <- factor(gsub("p|q", "", merged_df$Arm.x), levels = c(1:22, "X"))
merged_df$ChrArm <- factor(ifelse(grepl("p", merged_df$Arm.x), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q"))

# Label points (optional, adjust threshold)
merged_df$label <- ifelse(abs(merged_df$signed_logp) > 4, as.character(merged_df$Arm.x), "")

# Build the ggscatter + facet object
p <- facet(
  ggscatter(
    merged_df,
    x = "Delta",
    y = "signed_logp",
    color = "Chromosome",
    shape = "ChrArm",
    xlab = "Timing Δ (Post-WGD - Pre-WGD)",
    ylab = "Signed –log10(p-value)",
    label = "label",
    font.label = c(8, "black")
  ),
  facet.by = "Plottitle",
  nrow = 6,
  ncol = 5
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, se = FALSE) +
  stat_cor(label.y = 6, method = "spearman", size = 3.5) +
  ylim(-5, 6.5) +
  theme_bw()

print(p)
```

```{r}
colnames(merged_df)
```

```{r}
# --- Step 1: Filter to gains and create plotting columns ---
fulldf <- merged_df %>%
  filter(Event.x == "Gain") %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val),
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    Chromosome = factor(gsub("p|q", "", Arm.x), levels = c(1:22, "X")),
    ChrArm = factor(ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q")),
    label = ifelse(abs(signed_logp) > 2, as.character(Arm.x), "")
  )

fulldf$Plottitle <- factor(fulldf$Plottitle, levels = unique(fulldf$Plottitle))

# --- Step 2: Plot to PDF ---
library(ggpubr)

pdf("chr_gains_timing_PeterVanLoo/GAIN_DeltaWGD_vs_signedlogp_scatterplots.pdf", width = 16, height = 10)

facet(ggscatter(
  fulldf,
  x = "Delta",
  y = "signed_logp",
  color = "Chromosome",
  shape = "ChrArm",
  xlab = "Proportion Gained Post-WGD - Pre-WGD",
  ylab = "Signed -log10(P)",
  label = "label",
  font.label = c(8, "black")
), 
facet.by = "Plottitle", nrow = 6, ncol = 5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, se = FALSE) +
  stat_cor(label.y = 6, method = "spearman", size = 3.5) +
  ylim(-5, 6.5) +
  theme_bw()

dev.off()
```


```{r}
library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)

# Step 1: Filter to immune-depleting gains (Z < 0)
merged_df_filtered <- merged_df %>%
  filter(Event.x == "Gain", Z_val < 0)

# Step 2: Add signed –log10(p), plotting labels, etc.
fulldf <- merged_df_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val),
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    Chromosome = factor(gsub("p|q", "", Arm.x), levels = c(1:22, "X")),
    ChrArm = factor(ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q")),
    label = ifelse(abs(signed_logp) > 2, as.character(Arm.x), "")
  )

fulldf$Plottitle <- factor(fulldf$Plottitle, levels = unique(fulldf$Plottitle))

# Step 3: Plot to PDF
pdf("chr_gains_timing_PeterVanLoo/GAIN_ImmuneDepleting_scatterplots.pdf", width = 16, height = 10)

facet(ggscatter(
  fulldf,
  x = "Delta",
  y = "signed_logp",
  color = "Chromosome",
  shape = "ChrArm",
  xlab = "Proportion Gained Post-WGD - Pre-WGD",
  ylab = "Signed -log10(P)"
), 
facet.by = "Plottitle", nrow = 6, ncol = 5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, se = FALSE) +
  stat_cor(label.y = 6, method = "spearman", size = 3.5) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(fulldf, label != ""),
    aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp, label = label),
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black",
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    box.padding = 0.25,
    segment.color = "grey50"
  ) +
  ylim(-5, 6.5) +
  theme_bw()

dev.off()
```




```{r}
fulldf <- merge(gaindf_filt[,-c(2:3)], arm_reg_df, by=0) %>% select(-Row.names)
fulldf$TCGA_TumorType <- factor(fulldf$TCGA_TumorType, levels = sort(unique(fulldf$TCGA_TumorType)))
fulldf <- fulldf[order(fulldf$TCGA_TumorType, fulldf$Arm),]
fulldf$Plottitle <- paste0(fulldf$TumorType, " (", fulldf$TCGA_TumorType, ")")
fulldf$Plottitle <- factor(fulldf$Plottitle, levels = unique(fulldf$Plottitle))
fulldf$Chromosome <- factor(gsub("p|q", "", fulldf$Arm), levels = c(1:22, "X"))
fulldf$ChrArm <- factor(ifelse(grepl("p", fulldf$Arm), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q"))

# highlight interesting events
fulldf$label <- ifelse((fulldf$Z_val < -0.5 | fulldf$Z_val > 0.5) & (fulldf$Gain_Delta < -0.1 | fulldf$Gain_Delta > 0.1), as.character(fulldf$Arm), "")
fulldf$label <- ifelse(fulldf$Gain_Delta < -0.2 | fulldf$Gain_Delta > 0.2, as.character(fulldf$Arm), fulldf$label)
fulldf$label <- ifelse(fulldf$Z_val < -1.5 | fulldf$Z_val > 1.5, as.character(fulldf$Arm), fulldf$label)

```

```{r}
# === OUTPUT ===
pdf("chr_gains_timing_PeterVanLoo/GAIN_DeltaWGD_vs_ImmuneRegression_scatterplots.pdf", width = 16, height = 10)
facet(ggscatter(fulldf, x = "Gain_Delta", y = "Z_val",
                color = "Chromcanosome", shape = "ChrArm",
                xlab = "Proportion Gained Post-WGD - Proportion Gained Pre-WGD", 
                ylab = "Immune Regression Z-value", 
                label = "label", font.label = c(8, "black")), 
       facet.by = "Plottitle", nrow = 6, ncol = 5) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha=0.25) + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, alpha=0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth=0.5, se = F) +
  stat_cor(label.y = 6, method = "spearman", size=3.5) + ylim(-5, 6.5) +
  theme_bw()
dev.off()
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggpubr)
library(grid)  # for unit()

# Prepare the data
fulldf_gain <- merged_df %>%
  filter(Event.x == "Gain") %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val),
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    Chromosome = gsub("p|q", "", Arm.x),
    ChrArm = ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"),
    label = as.character(Arm.x)
  )

fulldf_gain$Plottitle <- factor(fulldf_gain$Plottitle, levels = unique(fulldf_gain$Plottitle))
fulldf_gain$Chromosome <- factor(fulldf_gain$Chromosome, levels = as.character(1:22))
fulldf_gain$ChrArm <- factor(fulldf_gain$ChrArm, levels = c("p", "q"))

# The plot
p_gain <- ggplot(fulldf_gain, aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Chromosome, shape = ChrArm), size = 2, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 2.5, vjust = -0.8, check_overlap = TRUE) +  
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", label.y.npc = 0.95, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~Plottitle, nrow = 6, ncol = 5, scales = "fixed") +
  xlim(-0.1, 0.2) +
  ylim(-2, 2.5) +
  xlab("Δ = Proportion Gained Post–WGD – Pre–WGD") +
  ylab("Signed –log10(P)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )
# Save to PDF
pdf("chr_gains_timing_PeterVanLoo/GAIN_fixed_xticks_ALLFACETS.pdf", width = 16, height = 10)
print(p_gain)
dev.off()

```

```{r}
# Make sure the necessary columns are present and rename for clarity
supp_df <- merged_df %>%
  transmute(
    TCGA_TumorType = TCGA_TumorType.x,
    TumorType = TumorType,
    Arm = Arm.x,
    Event = Event.x,
    PreWGD = PreWGD,
    PostWGD = PostWGD,
    Delta = Delta,
    Z_val = Z_val,
    P_val = P_val,
    signed_logp = signed_logp
  ) %>%
  arrange(TCGA_TumorType, Event, Arm)

# Write to CSV
write.csv(supp_df, "Supplementary_Table_CNV_Timing.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

only BRCA and BLCA
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)

# ---- Filter merged_df to only BRCA + BLCA ----
subset_df <- merged_df %>%
  filter(TCGA_TumorType.x %in% c("BRCA", "BLCA")) %>%
  mutate(
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    Chromosome = gsub("p|q", "", Arm.x),
    ChrArm = ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"),
    label = as.character(Arm.x)
  )

# ---- GAIN ----
gain_df <- subset_df %>%
  filter(Event.x == "Gain") %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val)
  )

p_gain <- ggplot(gain_df, aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Chromosome, shape = ChrArm), size = 2, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 2.5, vjust = -1, check_overlap = TRUE) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", label.y.npc = 0.95, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~Plottitle, nrow = 1) +
  xlim(-0.05, 0.2) +
  ylim(-2, 2.5) +
  xlab("WGD Timing") +
  ylab("Signed –log10(P)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# ---- LOSS ----
loss_df <- subset_df %>%
  filter(Event.x == "Loss") %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = -1 * sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val)
  )

p_loss <- ggplot(loss_df, aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Chromosome, shape = ChrArm), size = 2, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 2.5, vjust = -1, check_overlap = TRUE) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", label.y.npc = 0.95, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~Plottitle, nrow = 1) +
  xlim(-0.1, 0.2) +
  ylim(-2, 2.5) +
  xlab("Δ = Proportion Lost Post–WGD – Pre–WGD") +
  ylab("Signed –log10(P)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# ---- Save both ----
ggsave("BRCA_BLCA_GAIN.pdf", plot = p_gain, width = 10, height = 4)
ggsave("BRCA_BLCA_LOSS.pdf", plot = p_loss, width = 10, height = 4)
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)

# --- Subset for BRCA and BLCA only ---
df_filtered <- merged_df %>%
  filter(TCGA_TumorType.x %in% c("BRCA", "BLCA")) %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val),
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, "): ", Event.x),
    Chromosome = gsub("p|q", "", Arm.x),
    ChrArm = ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"),
    label = as.character(Arm.x)
  )

# --- Add custom x-axis limits per tumor and event ---
df_filtered <- df_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    x_min = case_when(
      TCGA_TumorType.x == "BRCA" & Event.x == "Gain" ~ 0.0,
      TCGA_TumorType.x == "BLCA" & Event.x == "Gain" ~ -0.05,
      TCGA_TumorType.x == "BRCA" & Event.x == "Loss" ~ -0.2,
      TCGA_TumorType.x == "BLCA" & Event.x == "Loss" ~ -0.05
    ),
    x_max = case_when(
      TCGA_TumorType.x == "BRCA" & Event.x == "Gain" ~ 0.1,
      TCGA_TumorType.x == "BLCA" & Event.x == "Gain" ~ 0.25,
      TCGA_TumorType.x == "BRCA" & Event.x == "Loss" ~ 0.3,
      TCGA_TumorType.x == "BLCA" & Event.x == "Loss" ~ 0.3
    )
  )

# --- Plot ---
p <- ggplot(df_filtered, aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = ChrArm), size = 2, alpha = 0.9, color = "black", fill = "black", stroke = 0) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 2.5, vjust = -1, check_overlap = TRUE) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", label.y.npc = 0.95, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~Plottitle, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  xlab("WGD Timing") +
  ylab("Signed -log10(P)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"  # remove legend since color isn't used
  )

# --- Save to PDF ---
ggsave("BRCA_BLCA_Gain_Loss_Delta_vs_signedlogP.pdf", plot = p, width = 12, height = 6)
```

## loss 
```{r}
fulldf_loss <- merged_df %>%
  filter(Event.x == "Loss") %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = -1 * sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val),
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    Chromosome = factor(gsub("p|q", "", Arm.x), levels = c(1:22, "X")),
    ChrArm = factor(ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q")),
    label = ifelse(abs(signed_logp) > 2, as.character(Arm.x), "")
  )

fulldf_loss$Plottitle <- factor(fulldf_loss$Plottitle, levels = unique(fulldf_loss$Plottitle))

library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)

pdf("chr_loss_timing_PeterVanLoo/LOSS_DeltaWGD_vs_signedlogp_scatterplots.pdf", width = 16, height = 10)

facet(ggscatter(
  fulldf_loss,
  x = "Delta",
  y = "signed_logp",
  color = "Chromosome",
  shape = "ChrArm",
  xlab = "Proportion Lost Post-WGD - Pre-WGD",
  ylab = "Signed -log10(P)"
),
facet.by = "Plottitle", nrow = 6, ncol = 5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, se = FALSE) +
  stat_cor(label.y = 6, method = "spearman", size = 3.5) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(fulldf_loss, label != ""),
    aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp, label = label),
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black",
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    box.padding = 0.25,
    segment.color = "grey50"
  ) +
  ylim(-5, 6.5) +
  theme_bw()

dev.off()

```

```{r}
library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)

# Step 1: Filter to immune-depleting losses (Z < 0)
merged_df_filtered <- merged_df %>%
  filter(Event.x == "Loss", Z_val < 0)

# Step 2: Prepare plotting variables and labels (no Delta filter)
fulldf <- merged_df_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val),
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    Chromosome = factor(gsub("p|q", "", Arm.x), levels = c(1:22, "X")),
    ChrArm = factor(ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q")),
    label = ifelse(abs(signed_logp) > 2, as.character(Arm.x), "")
  )

fulldf$Plottitle <- factor(fulldf$Plottitle, levels = unique(fulldf$Plottitle))

# Step 3: Plot and export to PDF
pdf("chr_loss_timing_PeterVanLoo/LOSS_ImmuneDepleting_scatterplots.pdf", width = 16, height = 10)

facet(ggscatter(
  fulldf,
  x = "Delta",
  y = "signed_logp",
  color = "Chromosome",
  shape = "ChrArm",
  xlab = "Proportion Lost Post-WGD - Pre-WGD",
  ylab = "Signed -log10(P)"
),
facet.by = "Plottitle", nrow = 6, ncol = 5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, se = FALSE) +
  stat_cor(label.y = 6, method = "spearman", size = 3.5) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(fulldf, label != ""),
    aes(x = Delta, y = signed_logp, label = label),
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black",
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    box.padding = 0.25,
    segment.color = "grey50"
  ) +
  ylim(-5, 6.5) +
  theme_bw()

dev.off()
```

Less strethced
```{r}
library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)

# Step 1: Filter and mutate loss data
fulldf_loss <- merged_df %>%
  filter(Event.x == "Loss") %>%
  mutate(
    signed_logp = -1 * sign(Z_val) * -log10(P_val),  # for Loss: signed_logp flipped
    Plottitle = paste0(TumorType, " (", TCGA_TumorType.x, ")"),
    Chromosome = factor(gsub("p|q", "", Arm.x), levels = c(1:22, "X")),
    ChrArm = factor(ifelse(grepl("p", Arm.x), "p", "q"), levels = c("p", "q")),
    label = as.character(Arm.x)  # ← Label all cytobands
  )

# Reorder plot titles
fulldf_loss$Plottitle <- factor(fulldf_loss$Plottitle, levels = unique(fulldf_loss$Plottitle))

# Step 2: Plot and save to PDF
pdf("chr_loss_timing_PeterVanLoo/LOSS_DeltaWGD_vs_signedlogp_ALLLABELS_lessstretched.pdf", width = 16, height = 10)

facet(ggscatter(
  fulldf_loss,
  x = "Delta",
  y = "signed_logp",
  color = "Chromosome",
  shape = "ChrArm",
  xlab = "Proportion Lost Post-WGD - Pre-WGD",
  ylab = "Signed -log10(P)",
  label = "label",
  font.label = c(6, "black")
),
facet.by = "Plottitle", nrow = 6, ncol = 5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, se = FALSE) +
  stat_cor(label.y = 4, method = "spearman", size = 3) +
  xlim(-0.3, 0.3) +        # ← Less stretched X-axis
  ylim(-4, 4) +          # ← Less stretched Y-axis
  theme_bw()

dev.off()
```


# Supplementary table
```{r}
# === Compute Spearman correlation (R and P) per Tumor × Event ===
library(dplyr)

cor_stats <- merged_df %>%
  group_by(TCGA_TumorType.x, Event.x) %>%
  summarize(
    R = cor(Delta, signed_logp, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    P = suppressWarnings(cor.test(Delta, signed_logp, method = "spearman")$p.value),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(TCGA_TumorType = TCGA_TumorType.x, Event = Event.x)

# === Build final supplementary table ===
supp_df <- merged_df %>%
  transmute(
    TCGA_TumorType = TCGA_TumorType.x,
    TumorType = TumorType,
    Arm = Arm.x,
    Event = Event.x,
    PreWGD = PreWGD,
    PostWGD = PostWGD,
    Delta = Delta,
    Z_val = Z_val,
    P_val = P_val,
    signed_logp = signed_logp
  ) %>%
  left_join(cor_stats, by = c("TCGA_TumorType", "Event"))

# === Export to CSV ===
write.csv(supp_df, "Supplementary_Table_Timing_GainLoss_with_R_and_P.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
